title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa
analysis: The Great Wave off Kanagawa captures the raw power of nature with its towering wave, juxtaposed with the small boats symbolizing human vulnerability as well as resilience. The presence of Mount Fuji provides a sense of stability amidst the chaos, while the use of ukiyo-e technique adds a sense of fluidity and movement. The work explores themes of impermanence, highlighting the transient nature of life and the indomitable spirit of those who face its challenges.
